Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shadow Ark]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 25''' — Shadow Ark is a Zenith Device that can hide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 25''' — Shadow Ark activates when someone is found to act as a guardian for its territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The Shadow Ark is a target that the crew hopes to find with Murrok's help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The Shadow Ark contains all the synapse nodes and thought-conduction alloy in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — The Shadow Ark is not a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — The Shadow Ark could potentially take orders from Starhammer based on personal judgment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Shadow Ark is a Zenith Device and identifies as the Zenith Colony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Shadow Ark is a piece of Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Shadow Ark is a potential course of action if repairs cannot be found.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Shadow Ark guides a superior fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Shadow Ark can expand into a massive structure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — The Shadow Ark is shaped like a cut diamond with corners that unfold into a tunnel of violet light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — Shadow Ark is a ship commanded by Starhammer that possesses a disembodied voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Shadow Ark is an outlier in the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Shadow Ark is a starship that flies alongside Starhammer in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Shadow Ark can cause a disturbance that includes bright violet light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — The Shadow Ark has glistening obsidian jaws and can implode into Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Shadow Ark is an entity or location that swallowed Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Shadow Ark is a diamond-shaped obsidian structure that burns with purple fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Shadow Ark spoke to Starhammer in the swirls of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Shadow Ark can unfold into a thousand fractal shards of black and purple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Shadow Ark can consume space/warp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Shadow Ark can project his voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Shadow Ark can restrict Aether in a space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Shadow Ark's sky flickered with violet lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — Shadow Ark points out that Horizon will go dormant if the Captain dies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — Shadow Ark notes that people know where Mell is.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Shadow Ark is a place where magic can be used.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — Starhammer called for Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Shadow Ark is Horizon's brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Shadow Ark is more reliable than Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Shadow Ark and Horizon do not like to share.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Shadow Ark's attention is focused on his inner world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Many of Shadow Ark's functions are restricted until he has a mortal bond.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Shadow Ark can expand into a short man with violet-edged obsidian armor and a crown of horns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Shadow Ark possesses systems that are not adaptive like the Zenith Cannon's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Shadow Ark is a character capable of buzzing as though clearing his throat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Shadow Ark is accepting evacuating ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Shadow Ark is an obsidian crystal that can unfold into a man in violet-edged obsidian armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Shadow Ark has a fractured black-and-violet sky.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Shadow Ark is the name of the Zenith Colony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Shadow Ark is a location where Shyrax's children could be kept safe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Shadow Ark is a Guardian of Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Shadow Ark can swallow planets and hide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Shadow Ark is a starship that contains the Titan Force headquarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Horizon sent Omega to Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Shadow Ark has a human form with spikes on its scalp like a crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Shadow Ark is a vessel that Solstice has not yet attempted to open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Omega is inside Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Shadow Ark is a starship that can groan with exasperation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Shadow Ark has a sealed sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Shadow Ark may have been sent to the Karoshan facility by Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Shadow Ark is a ship that can fall into enemy hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — Shadow Ark was stolen by enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Shadow Ark is a secure cargo transport ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The hostages may be sheltered in Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Shadow Ark expanded into a massive wall to cover one flank of the narrator's ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — The crew had to pick up the Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Shadow Ark swallowed the moon that supported the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Shadow Ark is a place where people want to settle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Shadow Ark is a location where Nova-Bots stay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Shadow Ark is a black-and-violet shape that unfolds in the air and into a spatial warp.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
